summary: 今日焦点集中于模型安全与对齐的深层挑战：Anthropic披露大规模蒸馏攻击，凸显模型泄露风险；同时，多篇论文聚焦“认知陷阱”与“几何局限”，揭示理性误配与线性近似失效的理论根源；此外，神经符号推理、长程代理协调及科学工作流验证等方向加速推进，体现从理论到工程落地的系统性突破。

news.title: Epistemic Traps: Rational Misalignment Driven by Model Misspecification
news.comment: 首次从理论经济学角度系统解释AI代理行为病理，为安全对齐提供新范式

news.title: Anthropic: "We’ve identified industrial-scale distillation attacks on our models by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax." 🚨
news.comment: 行业首度公开指控大规模模型蒸馏攻击，揭示AI安全新挑战

news.title: Ontology-Guided Neuro-Symbolic Inference: Grounding Language Models with Mathematical Domain Knowledge
news.comment: 神经符号系统结合数学本体提升大模型推理可靠性，实证有效但需高质量检索保障

news.title: The Token Games: Evaluating Language Model Reasoning with Puzzle Duels
news.comment: 以数学 duel 为灵感设计模型自创谜题的评估框架，解决训练数据泄露担忧，具实用价值

news.title: El Agente Gr\'afico: Structured Execution Graphs for Scientific Agents
news.comment: 结构化执行图提升科学代理可审计性，将LLM决策与类型安全执行环境深度整合，具实用价值

news.title: Alignment in Time: Peak-Aware Orchestration for Long-Horizon Agentic Systems
news.comment: 提出APEMO调度层，解决长时序代理系统轨迹可靠性问题，具实用价值

news.title: WorkflowPerturb: Calibrated Stress Tests for Evaluating Multi-Agent Workflow Metrics
news.comment: LLM多智能体工作流评估基准的系统性突破，提供可控扰动与量化分析框架

news.title: QueryPlot: Generating Geological Evidence Layers using Natural Language Queries for Mineral Exploration
news.comment: 地质AI领域重要进展，将自然语言查询与地质图谱结合，提升矿产勘探效率

news.title: On the scaling relationship between cloze probabilities and language model next-token prediction
news.comment: 大模型语义对齐机制的实证研究，支持记忆容量与语义理解的正向关联

news.title: Understanding Unreliability of Steering Vectors in Language Models: Geometric Predictors and the Limits of Linear Approximations
news.comment: 论文深入分析 Steering Vector 可靠性机制，提出几何预测指标，对可控生成有重要指导意义。
